title: Restore ProcedureTask segmented stages in score version lists
description: Procedure cards in score/version procedure lists load without a toast now, but the segmented progress bar still only shows the generic completed segment instead of actual task stages. Trace ProcedureTask's expected stage shape and fix the score procedure adapter.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Changed procedure-list task hydration to query tasks by account and match Task.target to procedure/run/<procedureId> or procedure/<procedureId>. Task.scoreId is not reliable for procedure task lookup, which left ProcedureTask with no stages and only the generic completion segment.
